name: @radzor/state-machine
description: Finite state machine with guards, transition actions, and history tracking. Define states, transitions, and conditional logic for complex stateful workflows.

inputs.name: definition
inputs.description: State machine definition with states, transitions, and guards.

inputs.name: context
inputs.description: Initial context data available to guards and actions.

inputs.name: historySize
inputs.description: Maximum number of transition records to keep in history.

events.name: onTransition
events.description: Fired after a successful state transition.

events.name: onGuardRejected
events.description: Fired when a transition is blocked by a guard condition.

actions.name: transition

params.name: event
params.description: Event name that triggers the transition.

params.name: payload
params.description: Optional payload passed to guards and actions.

actions.description: Attempt to transition the machine by sending an event.

actions.name: getState
actions.description: Get the current machine state, context, and history.

actions.name: reset
actions.description: Reset the machine to its initial state and clear history.

actions.name: canTransition
actions.description: Check if an event can trigger a transition from the current state.

connectsTo.description: Track state transitions for audit trail

llm.constraints: State is in-memory; lost on process restart. Guards must be synchronous functions. Context mutations in actions should return new objects, not mutate in place.
